notes: Older course in Hat Yai city area. Designer Robert McFarland per golfshake; year opened disputed (1993 per initial search / 1995 per 1golf.eu). GPS confirmed from golfshake: 7.00205, 100.457. Green fees 600/900 THB from 1golf.eu. An older source (phil.uk.net, ~2011) cites 950/1,400 THB and a caddie fee of 300 THB / cart 600 THB — but this may confuse Hat Yai Resort with Southern Hills Golf (same city, different course). Using 1golf.eu 600/900 THB as primary with provisional flag. Cart: golfshake says no carts available; 1golf.eu says electro-cart available — conflicting, using null pending confirmation. Driving range: golfshake says no; 1golf.eu says yes — conflicting, using null. Phone: +66 74 434 7703. Address: 94 Moo 4, Thung Tam Sao, Hat Yai District, Songkhla 90110.

year_opened.note: 1golf.eu says 1995; golfshake/initial search says 1993. Using 1993 pending confirmation.

green_fee_weekday_thb.note: PROVISIONAL — 1golf.eu. Older source (2011) cites 950 THB but may confuse with Southern Hills.

caddie_fee_thb.note: PROVISIONAL — older source; may apply to southern-hills instead. Confirm by phone.

cart_fee_thb.note: Conflicting: golfshake says no carts; 1golf.eu says available. Confirm by phone.

driving_range.note: Conflicting: golfshake says no driving range; 1golf.eu says yes. Confirm by phone.

website.note: 20m.com free hosting — likely inactive. No current official website found.
